title: Infinispan JDBC Cache Store Configuration
description: String-keyed JDBC cache store configuration for Infinispan.

StringKeyedJdbcStore.description: Defines a JDBC string-keyed cache store.

key-to-string-mapper.description: The class name of a Key2StringMapper to use for mapping keys to strings suitable for storage in a database table.

StringKeyedTable.description: Defines the table used to store cache entries.

prefix.description: Defines the prefix prepended to the cache name used when composing the name of the cache entry table.

Table.description: Base table configuration for JDBC stores.

fetch-size.description: The fetch size used when querying from this table. Used to avoid heap memory exhaustion when query is large.

batch-size.description: The statement batch size used when modifying this table.

create-on-start.description: Determines whether database tables should be created by the store on startup.

drop-on-exit.description: Determines whether database tables should be dropped by the store on shutdown.

IdColumn.description: Defines the column in which to store the cache key or bucket id.

name.description: The name of the column used to store the cache key or bucket id.

type.description: The type of the column used to store the cache key or bucket id.

DataColumn.description: Defines the column in which to store the cache entry or bucket.

name.description: The name of the column used to store the cache entry or bucket.

type.description: The type of the column used to store the cache entry or bucket.

TimestampColumn.description: Defines the column in which to store the timestamp of the cache entry or bucket.

name.description: The name of the column used to store the cache entry or bucket timestamp.

type.description: The type of the column used to store the cache entry or bucket timestamp.

SegmentColumn.description: Defines the column in which to store the segment number.

name.description: The name of the column used to store the segment number.

type.description: The type of the column used to store the segment number.
